info.title: multithreatscanapi
info.description: Scan text, files, and URLs for multiple threat types in a single API call.

post.summary: Scan text for multiple threat types including viruses, phishing, spam, DLP, and policy violations in a single API call.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Text scan request with content and scan configuration

post.summary: Scan a file for multiple threat types including viruses, NSFW, AI-generated content, fraud, phishing, spam, DLP, and policy violations in a single API call.
Scan a URL for multiple threat types including viruses, phishing, and policy violations in a single API call. Optionally download and scan the file at the URL.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: URL scan request with URL and scan configuration

CleanResult.description: True if no AI-generated content was detected

AiConfidenceLevel.description: Confidence level of AI content detection (0.0 to 1.0)

Verdict.description:
Categorical assessment of whether the file appears AI-generated based on its
embedded metadata. One of: NoDeterministicAiMetadataFound, VerifiedAiGenerated,
VerifiedAiEditedOrComposite, LikelyAiGenerated, LikelyAiEditedOrComposite,
PossibleAiGenerated, ConflictingSignals, MetadataUnavailableOrUnreadable,
UnsupportedFileType.

Provider.description:
AI provider name (for example, "OpenAI", "Adobe", "Google", "Microsoft").
Empty when the metadata does not identify a provider.

Generator.description:
AI tool or product name (for example, "ChatGPT", "Adobe Firefly", "Stable
Diffusion"). Empty when the metadata does not identify a specific tool.

Warnings.description:
Non-fatal warnings produced during analysis, intended for diagnostic display.
Empty when no warnings were produced.

DetectedFileType.description:
File type detected from the file's content (for example, "jpeg", "png", "pdf").
May differ from the file's name extension when the content was misnamed.

ContentScanningConfig.description: Configuration for downloading and scanning the file at a URL

DownloadAndScan.description: Download and scan the file at the URL

ContentScanningResult.description: Result of content scanning (downloading and scanning a file from URL)

DownloadedFileFormat.description: Detected file format of downloaded content

DlpDetectionConfig.description: DLP (PII/PHI) detection configuration for text scanning

DlpDetectionFileConfig.description: DLP detection configuration for file scanning (extends text config with RecognitionMode)

CleanResult.description: True if no PII/PHI was detected

FileScanResults.description: Individual scan results for a file scan

ResultCrossCheck.description: Result cross-check mode: None or Advanced

UserEmailAddress.description: User email address for verification context

UserEmailAddressVerified.description: Whether the user email has been verified

CleanResult.description: True if no fraud was detected

MultiThreatFileResponse.description: Response from a multi-threat file scan

Successful.description: True if the scan completed successfully

CleanResult.description: True if all enabled scans returned clean results

VerifiedFileFormat.description: Content-verified file format from virus scan

MultiThreatTextRequest.description: Request to scan text for multiple threat types

TextContent.example: Check out this amazing offer at http://example.com

MultiThreatTextResponse.description: Response from a multi-threat text scan

Successful.description: True if the scan completed successfully

CleanResult.description: True if all enabled scans returned clean results

MultiThreatUrlRequest.description: Request to scan a URL for multiple threat types

Url.description: The URL to scan (must include http:// or https://)

MultiThreatUrlResponse.description: Response from a multi-threat URL scan

Successful.description: True if the scan completed successfully

CleanResult.description: True if all enabled scans returned clean results
True if no NSFW content was found

PhishingDetectionFileResult.description: Phishing detection result for file scanning

CleanResult.description: True if no phishing was detected

PhishingDetectionTextConfig.description: Phishing detection configuration for text scanning

TextType.description: Type of text: TextMessage, UserMessage, SalesLead, EmailMessage, SupportCase, AppMessage, Other

Model.description: Model to use: Normal or Advanced

CustomPolicyID.description: Custom policy ID for managed instances

PhishingDetectionTextResult.description: Phishing detection result for text scanning

CleanResult.description: True if no phishing was detected

PhishingDetectionUrlResult.description: Phishing detection result for URL scanning

CleanResult.description: True if no phishing was detected

IsSsrfThreat.description: URL is a server-side request forgery threat

PolicyEnforcementConfig.description: Policy enforcement configuration with custom rules

Rules.description: List of policy rules to enforce

CleanResult.description: True if no policy violations were found

RuleDescription.description: Natural language description of the policy rule
RuleDescription.example: Documents must not contain financial advice

RuleViolationRiskScore.description: Risk score for this violation (0.0 to 1.0)

Model.description: Model to use: Normal or Advanced

SpamDetectionFileConfig.description: Spam detection configuration for file scanning

Model.description: Model to use: Normal or Advanced

CleanResult.description: True if no spam was detected

TextScanResults.description: Individual scan results for a text scan

UrlScanResults.description: Individual scan results for a URL scan

FileName.description: Name of the file containing the virus

RestrictFileTypes.description: Restrict to specific file types (comma-separated extensions)

VirusScanContentInfo.description: Additional content information from virus scan

CleanResult.description: True if no threats were found

ErrorMessage.description: Error message if the scan failed

VirusScanUrlResult.description: Virus scan result for URL scanning

CleanResult.description: True if no threats were found

WebsiteThreatType.description: Website threat type: None, Malware, Phishing, ForcedDownload, UnableToConnect

WebsiteHttpResponseCode.description: HTTP response code from the website
